name: io.github.karlmehta/trustmodel-mcp
description: Trust evaluation, red-team, and governance for AI agents — local no-key TrustScore + governance and calibrated cloud scoring, via the Model Context Protocol.

environmentVariables.name: TRUSTMODEL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: TrustModel API key (free — 5 credits / $500 at https://app.trustmodel.ai) for calibrated cloud scoring. Optional: the local trustmodel_evaluate_local and trustmodel_govern tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: TRUSTMODEL_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the TrustModel API base URL (default https://api.trustmodel.ai).

environmentVariables.name: TRUSTMODEL_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Tool profile: 'default' exposes the 6 daily-driver tools; 'security' / 'advanced' / 'all' expose all 20.
